title: From EF to Argot: Solidity’s New Home - Lea Schmitt
description:
Solidity has entered a new chapter. Over the past months, the Solidity team transitioned out of the Ethereum Foundation and into Argot, an independent organization designed to support the language and its ecosystem in a more open, community-driven way.

Lea Schmitt from Argot Collective talked about what Argot is, why this change happened, and how it shapes the future of Solidity.
